company_summary: Upbound is the company behind Crossplane, the open-source project that extends Kubernetes to enable infrastructure-as-code and multi-cloud control planes. They build Universal Crossplane (UXP) and Upbound Cloud as their commercial offerings, targeting platform engineering teams managing cloud infrastructure at scale. Their trajectory is centered on becoming the standard control plane layer for enterprise cloud infrastructure.
fit_indicators: Upbound builds tooling for platform/DevOps teams managing enterprise infrastructure — Sudheer built and maintained enterprise-grade internal tooling at RNTBCI used across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operations, directly comparable organizational complexity

Crossplane and Upbound products integrate into microservices and cloud-native architectures — Sudheer has 4 years of microservices experience in Java/Spring Boot production systems, giving him credible technical grounding to speak to the developer persona

PM intern role likely involves synthesizing developer and platform engineer feedback into roadmap priorities — Sudheer's RNTBCI experience bridging legacy systems with modern microservices gives him firsthand perspective on platform pain points that Upbound's customers face

Upbound targets enterprise cloud adoption and governance — Sudheer worked within a large multinational automotive enterprise (RNTBCI) navigating real enterprise constraints, security (OKTA auth), and cross-org coordination, matching the customer profile Upbound sells into

Role intersects AI product and cloud tooling — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, signaling the kind of technical product curiosity and builder instinct that a developer-tools PM internship rewards

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager or Director of Product
contact_targets.reason: Direct manager or close collaborator for the intern role; best person to evaluate PM fit and advocate for the hire

contact_targets.title: Staff or Principal Engineer working on Crossplane or UXP
contact_targets.reason: Senior IC who works alongside PM function; can validate technical credibility and champion Sudheer internally based on his enterprise Java and microservices background

contact_targets.reason: Crossplane is open-source so this person shapes product-community feedback loops — a key function for a PM intern; warm entry point given Sudheer's interest in developer tooling
